LONG NAME: UNK_ELGBLTY_GRP_POP_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APL base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
COMMENT: 
This data element is triggered by an invalid value (i.e., not values 01–76) in any instance of 
MC_PLAN_ELGBLTY_GRP_POP_CD.
